who: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent vendor compliance reporting causes potential supplier penalties. We automate compliance report generation instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent vendor compliance reporting leads to potential supplier penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share insights in procurement-focused community forums
try_it: Let users try email notifications and a dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
